inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mahsoos kar raha hoon, sir dard kar raha hai, thoda kamzor bhi mehsoos ho raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, aur kabz ki shikayat bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: The addition of abdominal pain and constipation makes gastroenteritis a stronger possibility

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can still be considered, but the gastrointestinal symptoms are less typical

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid becomes more likely with the step-wise increase in fever and gastrointestinal symptoms, but more specific signs are needed for confirmation

inputs.text: Ab toh bukhar bahut tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, aur main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, severe weakness, and the presence of petechiae rash are cardinal signs that confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis is less likely given the severity of symptoms and the specific signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria could be considered, but the specific pattern of fever and gastrointestinal symptoms, along with the rash, points more towards typhoid

inputs.text: Haalat aur bigad gaya hai, bukhar abhi tak hai, aur main puri tarah thak gaya hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistent high fever, exhaustion, and the presence of bruising without injury confirm the diagnosis of typhoid and indicate a severe stage of the disease

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the severity and specific symptoms of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms for malaria and the strong evidence for typhoid
